responses.START: Hello! Welcome to customer support. How can I help you today?
responses.GREET: Hi there! I'm here to help. You can ask me about your order status, refund, returns, or anything else. What do you need help with?
responses.COLLECT_ORDER_ID: Sure, I can help with that. Could you please share your order ID?
responses.RE_COLLECT_ORDER_ID: I didn't catch that. Could you please repeat your order ID? It usually looks like ORD followed by numbers.
responses.NOT_FOUND: I'm sorry, I couldn't find an order with that ID. Please double-check and try again, or I can connect you to a human agent.
responses.ESCALATE: I understand. Let me connect you to one of our customer care agents. Please hold on for a moment.
responses.END: Thank you for contacting us. Have a great day!
responses.CLARIFY: I'm sorry, I didn't quite understand that. Could you please rephrase? You can ask about your order status, refund, or return.
responses.HANDLE_INQUIRY: I'd be happy to help with your inquiry. Could you please provide more details about what you're looking for?

order_status.processing: Your order {order_id} is currently being processed and will be shipped soon.
order_status.shipped: Great news! Your order {order_id} has been shipped and is on its way. Expected delivery: {eta}.
order_status.delivered: Your order {order_id} has been delivered. If you have any issues, I can help with a return.
order_status.cancelled: Your order {order_id} has been cancelled. If you need anything else, let me know.

refund_status.pending: Your refund for order {order_id} is being processed. It will be credited within 5-7 business days.
refund_status.approved: Your refund for order {order_id} has been approved and will reach your account in 2-3 business days.
refund_status.completed: Your refund for order {order_id} has already been processed and credited to your original payment method.
refund_status.rejected: Unfortunately, your refund request for order {order_id} was rejected. Would you like to speak to an agent?

return.initiated: Your return request for order {order_id} has been initiated. Our team will contact you within 24 hours to arrange pickup.
return.already_exists: A return request for order {order_id} already exists and is being processed.
return.not_eligible: Sorry, order {order_id} is not eligible for return as it falls outside the return window.

cancel.success: Your order {order_id} has been successfully cancelled. A refund will be initiated if applicable.
cancel.already_shipped: Unfortunately, order {order_id} has already been shipped and cannot be cancelled. You can initiate a return once received.
cancel.not_found: I couldn't find order {order_id} to cancel.

responses.emotion_frustrated: I understand this is frustrating. Let me help you resolve this as quickly as possible.
responses.emotion_angry: I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. I want to make this right for you.
responses.unknown_fallback: I'm not sure I understand. Could you please rephrase your question? You can ask about order status, refunds, returns, or connect with an agent.
